summary: S&P 500 +0.54%, Dow +0.37%, Nasdaq +0.69%, Russell 2000 +2.21%. S&P 500 and Nasdaq hit fresh intraday record highs on May 1. Apple surged 4%+ on earnings beat. April was best month for S&P 500 and Nasdaq since 2020. Despite earlier dip on US-Iran war commencement, all indexes are well above where they began 2026.
